accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and contextual details (USDA, statute) are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; details align with the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill appropriates funds for freeze/cold weather agricultural losses via block grants.

changes_to_existing_law.why: This is a standalone appropriation that does not amend or repeal existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the county disaster designation limit and state request requirement.

effective_dates.why: Notes fiscal year, 120-day report deadline, and quarterly reporting timing.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures appropriation amount, block grants, eligibility, reporting, and emergency designation.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

correct_entities.why: USDA, Office of the Secretary, committees, and statute named correctly.

correct_figures.why: $3.5 billion, dates, and 120-day deadline all match the bill.
